ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The protein sequence */,
  "asa" REAL /* Solvent accessibility (Angstrom squared) */,
  "phi" REAL /* Phi angle */,
  "psi" REAL /* Psi angle */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta angle (i-1=>i+1) */,
  "tau" REAL /* Tau angle (i-2=>i+1) */,
  "p_c" REAL /* Probability of coil configuration */,
  "p_e" REAL /* Probability of edge configuration */,
  "p_h" REAL /* Probability of helix configuration */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the sequence (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence being predicted */,
  "predicted_structure" TEXT /* Predicted structure of the protein */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction (between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES protein_sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version FOREIGN KEY ("model_version") REFERENCES models ("version")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Description of the training data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team's goals and objectives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "pmid" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_publications" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id", "publication_id")
)
